reviews.review_description: Love this game. Finished the main game in a few sessions and now working through 'Dad Mode'.  Fabulous game and such amazing fun. Only thing I could wish for is for a clearer indicator that the laid track is positioned correctly by the building site without having to wait until a train is running. Would also love to be able to 'ride the track' and view it from the front of the train.

reviews.review_title: One of the top Quest games
reviews.review_description:
I only discovered this recently but I'm totally hooked. It's every boy's dream (even us 63 year old boys!) to have a model railway layout simulator so you can tinker around building that N gauge layout you always dreamed of in the middle of your front room (which doesn't really have room!)

The icing on the cake would be if they added things like points but I can see that creating the UI to operate that kind of thing could be challenging.

It'd also be good if users could create more "Dad challenges" style layouts then share them with others (Slot Car VR gives an idea of how this could look).

Oh and if making a wish list - other locos too.

Anyway, brilliant game - just buy it - you won't be disappointed.

This game is amazing. I am a train guy and love this game. I got into playing it but it was way too short. Would love to see more added onto the story maybe add switch tracks the ability to be able to place tracks under pillars roundabouts and way more. I’m still using this to get a base line for one of the prjects I’m doing but is not fully equipped with everything I need. Again maybe something like a downhill curve and sharper curves as well. I am willing to help and help come up with ideas to make this game way better. Over amazing though.

reviews.review_title: Adorable game, but way too short!
reviews.review_description:
The game is absolutely wonderful! It’s very touching and cute, with a lovely backstory about the kid, the little people, and the trains. It’s a joy to play for anyone who loves cozy diorama puzzles—it’s an ideal experience.
The levels are very interesting and captivating, but unfortunately, there are simply too few of them. The 10 main levels are done in one evening, and you're left wanting so much more. The Sandbox mode is attractive and playable, but I personally prefer story-driven content with specific tasks from the developers. I wish there were many more prepared levels!
I really hope for a sequel or a large DLC with new chapters. The game is excellent, but it desperately needs more content!
I bought the game thinking it would be a fun building game. I bought it, couldn’t refund it and it wouldn’t let me get past the tutorial do NOT buy

I really didn’t want to put this in a review for fear of putting people off the game, as I think it’s brilliant.  The huge problem I have however is the menu interface.  I got all the way to level 2 and it didn’t save.  Is there a way that you can put on an automatic save or at least make the process of saving a game easier?  After losing my progress after getting to level two, I’m now forced to start again and that’s a real downer to be honest.  Like I say, I love the game, but the interface could do with some fixing.

reviews.review_title: Easily get sucked in and play for hours
reviews.review_description:
I have already sunk hours into this game in just a few days and I'm loving it. Honestly. The story puzzles are good - not too difficult, not too easy. And the sandbox mode is great. I've made some pretty cool tables.
I would LOVE to see more from this game, whether it be an update or a DLC. I'd love: 1, different engines. 2, customizable/paintable engines & train cars - could be just a color selector, but I think actually being able to paint them would be so cool, even if you could only paint the roof one color, and the body one color. I like the simplicity of the game and style, so that would be fine by me! 3, ability to have multiple trains on one track. 4, a merging track/switch track. 5, larger tables (choose between table sizes). 6, ability to walk around the whole table with thumb sticks. 7, sharper turn curve track piece.

Super relaxing cosy game. Controls are really excellent, tactile with subtle haptics. Beautiful atmosphere this is the game all kids should play. Note - it may seem hardest first but there's walkthroughs on YT to get the hang of it quickly. 5* golden gem, well done!
FUN!
one of the best vr games i have played, you should play it. 10/10
It made me feel like a kid again. Thank you.

Buy this.  I would gladly buy more like it.  This game is thoughtful, engaging, progressively challenging, and a complete surprise to me.  I wasnt esoecially into toy trains, I’m not a big puzzler, but dang if I didn’t work happily on this game almost nonstop until it was finished!  I’m gonna rework a few of those tracks now…
sup Wooow game 👍

There are so many elements to this game and after I had made it through all levels, I started modifying my previous layouts and then created some new scratch built ones. The only option that would make it better would be some switches for turning on to other tracks or turnouts but this is totally not an issue for me. Great job
Great game but would recommend adding a mode where you can go inside your world that you made.

I wanted a gentle demo to introduce friends to VR, and didn't think this would be for me - how wrong I was, I immediately bought the full version and have been having a child-like wonder of a time with it! The game has such a nostalgic charm to it of Sunday's spent playing with similar things like Scalextric and those hot wheels mats, I love this game! It is also a perfect way to bring new people into VR too(even more so if your device has passthrough) I don't normally leave reviews, but I just had to for this one!

I absolutely loved Toy Trains. It’s a wonderfully relaxing and imaginative game. The music is fantastic and really helps you unwind while playing. Most of the puzzles are accessible and enjoyable for everyone except maybe the final level, which is quite challenging!

For a potential sequel, it would be great to see larger maps where you can move freely across the entire table instead of being fixed in one spot. It would also be fun to have different types of trains, including high-speed ones.

Highly recommended if you’re looking for a peaceful, creative puzzle game.

I don't usually like puzzle games but this is a delight to play. Challenging but fun. I wish there were more levels A+

Maybe you could add other peoples layouts option??

Throughout my life, I've often wondered what it would be like to have a model railway...
It never happened for many reasons, no space, no money, no time and having kids!
But now I have one thanks to the Toy Trains VR app!
It's absolutely brilliant in every way, and in partial reality, it's like I have a large train set in my lounge!
You can create a wonderful set of your own from a blank canvas and let your creative juices flow, or tackle the challenging levels set for you by the app! There's no time limit, so no stress, just relax and have fun 😁
Never believed I'd have so much fun with such a reasonably priced app!
Along with Walkabout Mini Golf, this superb app is my "go-to" for instant fun on the VR!
I recommend you to buy it! 😁👍

I usually don't leave reviews but this one I just had to. When I was a kid I wanted a little wooden train set. This game pretty much gives me that option with animated characters and a full sandbox mode to make my own train set the way I want! I haven't been locked in a VR game this much since asgard's wrath 2 came out.

I only wish that there were more train options like different trains, extendable Bridges, and curved slopes. The only downside I seen to this is the over bridge is locked to only go over one piece of track. If that was extendable this would be perfect. Making the trains rideable would be awesome too. 
I hope in the future the same company develops a full train game where we have Amtrak, old coal trains, and everything you can think of!
Love this game, fun and entertaining. Good job!

reviews.review_title: Engaging Puzzle and Fantastic Game Play
reviews.review_description:
This is an amazing game.  The puzzles are tricky, but there are SO many ways to solve them.  It is totally addicting because you have so much creative freedom.  If you like puzzles you have to try this, even if you're not into trains per se.  

Great mechanics, engaging scenery and just plan fun!

Like others mention, I would love to be able to get more levels, or play levels other players create.  That would be cool.

On small control request would be the ability to keep a piece selected to put down multiple of them quickly, building a stack of pillars for example.

reviews.review_title: Charming, Nostalgic, and a lot of fun!
reviews.review_description:
I saw the trailer for this game a couple of weeks ago, and it sparked a feeling of being a kid again. I knew I had to get it.
After about a week of playing it, I'm not disappointed. The learning curve is quick and easy. It has charming graphics and a peaceful ambiance. I like the challenges but I'm glad there is a Sandbox mode where it gives you the freedom to do whatever you would like. 
I'm a fan and will be telling others about this one. Check out my quick review on my YouTube Channel: https://youtu.be/ZT7IhlMncKM?si=elVHgJV9KICedS0M

Awesome. Best ever. Please do a Christmas level with lamps, light up gingerbread houses, Christmas trees, etc. Also please think og doing the Oriental Express Marrakesh. Even if it is a paid DLC, it would be worth the money. The beauty of this app is profound.
Driving that train, high on cocaine.
Marrakesh Express
Peace Train

Please think of DLCs
- Christmas Polar Express
- Oriental Express
- Western cowboy
- Circus train

This app is from Poland. I learnt some Polish. Dzien dobre. Jestes app wygladas bardzo swietna. Slieczne. Dzien kuje. Trzmaj sie.

reviews.review_title: Relaxed & cute … and brilliant in MR!
reviews.review_description:
Not particularly difficult, but I had a lot of fun, and the game is incredibly cute.
The game is rather short with its simple story, but the additional challenges later on make for some relaxing puzzle-solving evenings. If there were a DLC with more challenges and/or new environments, I would gladly buy it.
…
…
…
This game shines in mixed reality! A clear area of ​​2.5x2.5m is perfectly sufficient and allows you to walk around the virtual table in reality. This creates the impression of a real table with a toy train world – right in your living room… and helps to manipulate the toy-world intuitively and easily. Great job!

Love the presentation of it. The story line is endearing. Camera controls are a bit annoying. Wish there was a switch track and I wish you could use more than one main building. Absolutely love the little engine and little car designs. Played it straight through the night I got it. I wish it had a table randomizer for terrain. This is the perfect game.

with DLC that can be a bit challenging at times. One of the VR games with the most potential. Personally, I’d recommend implementing switches, railway crossings, gates and traffic lights (at least in sandbox mode), and adding a way to quickly build terrain-leveling platforms in bulk — those were definitely the most work. Anyway, it’s already a super fun game!
So fun!! Love playing this game, awesome job

This is a great game. Graphics and controls are spot on. I had a blast playing it. Would be great if new levels were added or sandbox layouts could be saved and made available for others. Worth the purchase. Thank you!

Solving puzzles and building your tracks is such a fun and relaxing experience. First few levels are easy but then the difficulty rise and the chalange is just right - sometimes a little tough but never frustrating. Visuals are great, MR mode works superb. Must have game for any puzzle lovers.

reviews.review_title: Just cho cho chose to buy this
reviews.review_description:
Absolutely brilliant and beautiful little game. So well made and polished to shine like a sparkly diamond. 
Challenge is slow to start in first few levels in what is basically a tutorial but hold on as the difficulty ramps up. The added dad levels are a time sucker but feel a real sense of achievement when you complete a twisty turny rising and falling over er the bridge and through the tunnel loop.
Only wish there was even more levels as have completed everything a few different ways.
Please please please make a add on with more and I will be there on day one to purchase.
It's very adorable and not difficult, with beautiful diorama and beautiful environment (the attic). It has the most beautiful carpet 3D texture I've ever seen.
This game is so good, from the little people to the challenges of rearranging the track to make the loops. I really enjoy playing it.
The puzzles are interesting, and the graphics design is fun. You will enjoy it.

reviews.review_title: Get it if you like trains!
reviews.review_description: I just started playing through the levels.  I'm really impressed with the details which make this really worth it for me.  If you ever wanted a train set or had one in the past (and enjoyed it) get this game!  I'm hoping there will be a Toy Trains 2 in the future.
So much fun, binged every level, and now playing with my own tabletop build.

Awesome chill game.
One nice feature to add would be the ability to grab the playset and move it further away from you. It's a little close to you when playing sat on the sofa

I figured the game would be an amusing time-waster, but going through the story modes levels; I found myself just really getting into figuring out how to connect everything and doing it in the best possible ways every time. The maps and layouts would occasionally even call for some stopping and thinking as more houses got added on to take into account. In the last levels,  especially Level 10 (if not mainly) actually turned into a full on brain teaser for me.
I JUST finished this great little experience, and though I felt I got through it quickly, I was shocked to see my time stamp upon completing the story mode to be a full 5 hours and 46 minutes! 😂
So what started as an enjoyable time waster to play in a relaxing puzzle-esque game turned into a fast feeling almost 6 hours of play just doing 1 train set a day.

So I definitely recommend this chill and enjoyable experience, even for those who may not think it'll be quite THAT great like I didn't before diving into it.

I only take 1 star off because of my very very small playspace not working the best with there being zero locomotion in the game outside of taking a step left or right.
By Level 10, I was stretching across the in-game table trying to work on the other side without hovering so high up that it was a bit harder to see.
Everything outside of that is about perfect though!

reviews.review_title: The best train game on vr and not
reviews.review_description: I have played this game on steam, and 100% it(this includes achievements) so I thought I'd support the devs and buy the game again for me quest

This started out as so simple I would often wonder whether it was even worth keeping. As charming as it is to play, I felt like it was way too easy to keep my attention. But I persevered and now at level 9 I can confirm that it does indeed get much more challenging and brain teasing. I do love the relaxed pace though...no time limits, you can take as long as you need to work things out. I do wish there was more variety in track components (maybe they will be added later? I'm not sure), such as a shorter slope piece for tight spots, but then it is also rewarding to solve the problem with what you have to work with. Believe it or not, I think this qualifies as a puzzler, but very unique for that genre. I'm glad I didn't get a refund!

Something Random makes a different bet with this marvel, where you not only have fun riding amazing train tracks, you also put your ability to face emotions to "play". A gem so that adults and children can enjoy and reconnect with childhood. In addition, the story takes place in text labels, which makes the game easier for people with hearing disabilities. Fully adaptable and in several languages. I hope this game gets the recognition it deserves. Great job by the developers.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your kind review! It means the world to see that the players like it! 
Indeed- linking all generations with childhood nostalgia was one of key points for us when making this game. We hope it will bring you more and more joy every time you play it!

reviews.review_description:
That's the word that sums up this game I think - charming. The graphics are simple but cute. Interaction is very straightforward - pull toggles on objects to activate them, and pick up and put down sections of track, locomotives etc to build out your railway. And that's about it. The puzzles start simple each time to introduce new components but get progressively harder with bigger more devious layouts needed. It's a lovely, relaxing game that can be played sat down and with one hand.

Update: I've now finished the game as it stands at the moment (2 hours 51 minutes gameplay apparently). It's delightful. I can honestly say I think it's the most relaxing and most addictive game I've played in the last four years of VR. I can see no reason at all why it's not in the main Meta games store. I didn't spend much time playing with each level after solving it and I'll probably go back and mess around some. So there's at least 3 hours gameplay here and a lot more if you want to set yourself some challenges - use the least amount of track, use the most amount of track etc.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your review! It means the world to hear such nice words and know that Toy Trains serves it purpose- to entertain, relax and spread its charm. 
Good news is- we are soon going to launch a big update that will include 12 new, more challenging levels. This shall bring around 7h more of a gameplay + more (but we can't spoil it just yet!)
Regarding the meta store slot- thank you! We hope that changes as soon as possible and we are able to spread more joy and coziness in Toy Trains with more people out there :)

reviews.review_description: This is great fun for young and old,graphics great, have not come across any glitches…seem to recall very similar game on the Go headset which played for hours ..try it sure you will love it

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your review- it truly is very helpful! 
We are thrilled to hear that you liked our game and had a smooth experience. 
Hopefully we'll see each other again soon in the Toy Trains land! Choo choo!

reviews.review_description: A lot of fun.  Beautiful sets.  Easy and fun construction with some challenges to work out but nothing that spoils the relaxing fun.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for playing and reviewing Toy Trains! It really helps us a lot! 
What a delight it is to hear that you have enjoyed our game and found it relaxing - we aimed exactly for that.

reviews.review_description: 4 hours of pure fun, yet still challenging. One of the games I anticipated the most this year and I am very satisfied by the outcome. The place of this game is in the main shop!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your review! It really helps us (for example to get to the main shop!). 
We are very happy to hear that you have enjoyed Toy Trains and that it came up to your expectations. Please stay tuned, we have prepared even more content for Toy Trains to be even better!

reviews.review_title: It's a fun game to ca-boost your skills!
reviews.review_description:
I actually remember when I made my own tracks with trains at primary school. This game really takes me back to those days.

It's quite a good puzzle game. It's very tricky, but it's still very enjoyable! 😃

Make sure to stay on track and don't leave any houses behind like I did.

Remember, kids, if you decide to follow tracks, make sure you don't get hit by trains! 😉

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for taking the time to write this review! 
When making Toy Trains it was our goal to bring back childhood memories in a modern way. We are very happy that our game really made you feel that!

reviews.review_description: Great Fun building train sets and solving Puzzles. Wonderful Art Style and Music Too!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing and reviewing Toy Trains! 
We are happy about the fact that you've noticed and liked the music and art style! 
If you're interested- Toy Trains Soundtrack is available on Spotify and You Tube! 
https://open.spotify.com/album/5MftZMcPz5IqX3BS2GA1dG?si=nrWwBH19QxOagBZDKCJQIQ 
https://youtu.be/sylmqJhNrbo?feature=shared 
We hope to see you soon in Toy Trains land!

reviews.review_description: Work smooth, good graphics, I would like to have more levels! I met only one issue - when you take a new detail from the menu, it spawns with a bit not intuitive rotation.

developer_response.body:
Hi there- thank you for playing and reviewing Toy Trains! 
It's pleasant to hear you liked it and even want more. We have good news- there will be more content added very soon! 
Thank you also for bringing the mentioned issue to our attention. We will definitely take a look at it. 
See you again in Toy Trains land!

reviews.review_description:
Beautiful and relaxing with intuitive controls.
Build the tracks to solve the problems with no pressure or time restraint.
This is simply a wonderful game!
Such a great game. No other words. Super relaxing. Great puzzler.
Super fun game, and I love trains so this is a must have game

I never write reviews. This is my first time, and I have to do it for this game, Toy Trains VR. I just can't stop playing. It’s so relaxing and entertaining at the same time. I highly recommend it if you want to relax and have fun after a long day of work. The sandbox is the best; I have already created some crazy tracks. 
Thank you to the developers, and keep up the good work. I look forward to more improvements in the game. Thank you.

Perfect leisure game, takes me back to some childhood memories with a dear friend who loved trains! My only wish is that they added more trains, even if they were only different cosmetically. Even just having it so when you add a second track/train it’s just a different color would help a lot!

What can I say such a beautiful 
Endearing game beautiful graphics. 
10 leves to figure out ,and at a nice level of difficulty. 
only the 10th level I had to
 watch a play through. 
I love this game so much and there is a sandbox mode,  so you can just keep building what you want if you find the mission building taxing.
 My most Favourite game yet.
Extra extra!!!!!
My god when you finish the game you see a scrap book on the table it has a red tag with a sports cup .
When you pull this it opens another whole lots of new leves to complete FANTASTIC!!!!.
I hope there are more wonderful 
And intresting leves being made for this game I can't wait.
 😁
The only thing I would add as a negative is the hand controls when using the track pieces on the board can be frustrating to say the least.
But great game!

Was looking for a leisure table top game and found this one: very well designed and a lot of fun!
The interface is unique and fun to play with. Many details like a toy plane you can grab and hold to play like a 3 year old. The challenges are fun. The sandbox alone is worth the money: I've been looking for an open Lego/Minecraft like VR game for sometime and this is so far the closest that I can find. Good job!

If I can suggest something:
- please implement the support for grabbing the table to zoom in/out and rotate/tilt/move around. One example is the Demeo. This will make it so much easier to navigate aroma and the table and way cooler to interact with 
- maybe making the sandbox even bigger (as long as the system resource allows?): with the hand grabbing feature a bigger table will be so much fun to play with.

Keep it up! Love love love the game so far.
This game is by far one of the most enjoyable and beautiful casual games I have ever played.

Honestly, I am very easy to please with a vr game, but this was another level. I loved playing with wooden trains and when I heard about this game, I knew I had to get it. Had to wait a bit from the demo for the full release but it is an incredible game and I completely recommend this game to anyone that wants to relax

Didn’t really know what to expect when I bought it but I’m really digging it so far. The puzzle aspect has me hooked, but the presentation is what wows me the most. The only thing missing from this game is a legit sandbox mode.  I’d love to create my own towns/cities. This could really be special with a robust sandbox. Right now it’s still worth the asking price though. I’m really a big fan of the controls as well. Pulling the tabs from a notebook is pretty cool. 
Please please PLEASE continue updating this game. This is the type of game which could be updated for years to come if done correctly.  I’d gladly pay a little extra for some well thought out dlc.

developer_response.body:
Hey! Thank you so much for playing and reviewing Toy Trains! 
We are delighted to hear that you like the art style of our game and its challenges!
Pssst... we're preparing something special and what you're asking for might be available very soon!  
And yes- we plan to keep adding  to the game for as long as the players want it! The options are limitless. Thank you for your appreciation!

reviews.review_description: Wish it looks little better on the Quest 2. I mean little bit more polished ,still highly recommended game for sure for its gameplay.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! We are happy that you liked it- we will take a look at the polishing and add even more of the gameplay quite soon!

reviews.review_description:
Absolutely stunning game, I was not expecting to be blown away by this app, but from the get go it draws you in! 

I was expecting a game that would be more aimed at kids but it’s definitely for all ages, even some tricky little tasks of laying tracks of different sizes to try and complete your tasks! 

Hours of fun to be had in this game brilliant very well executed 😎

developer_response.body:
Hey! Thank you so much for your review! 
It's very nice that you've mentioned that Toy Trains is the game for all ages as it was crucial for us to create a game that would entertain everyone. 
Good news is- we are about to add more content to the game soon, so look out for this update and see you in the Toy Trains land!
